title: Your Mouthwash Is Destroying Your Gums — 6 Ancient Oils That Actually Heal Them (Ranked)
description: Right now, over 700 species of bacteria are living inside your mouth — and the terrifying truth is that your mouthwash is wiping out the wrong ones. Every time you swish that burning liquid, you're eliminating the good bacteria protecting your [...]

title: Archaeology team unearths 'prototype' of world-famous Stonehenge monument
description: LONDON (AP) — Archaeologists revealed Thursday that they have discovered a structure near the prehistoric stone circle of Stonehenge in southern England that may have served as a “prototype” for the 5,000-year-old Neolithic monument.
